  "findings": [
    "Confined space entry permit expired mid-shift while work was actively in progress",
    "Unauthorized entry/work continuing under an invalid permit"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Evacuate all personnel from the confined space immediately",
    "Cancel the expired permit and terminate the entry operation",
    "Perform atmospheric testing and re-evaluate hazards",
    "Issue a new confined space entry permit before any re-entry"
  ],
  "rationale": "Under OSHA 1910.146, entry operations must be terminated immediately if the permit expires or if a condition not allowed under the entry permit arises. Work cannot continue until the space is evacuated, re-evaluated, and a new permit is issued and signed by the entry supervisor.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.146(e)(5)",
    "OSHA 1910.146(f)"
  ]
}
